# Arnav Goel (Yash) — Full Portfolio Details

> Data Science student at UC San Diego specializing in Machine Learning, Graph Theory, and Entrepreneurship.

## About Arnav

Arnav Goel, also known as Yash, is a Data Science student at the University of California, San Diego (UCSD) with a GPA of 3.96/4.0. He is pursuing a minor in Entrepreneurship & Innovation. Growing up in India, he developed an early interest in patterns — whether in mathematics, market trends, or the intricate designs of traditional jewelry. This curiosity led him to pursue Data Science at UCSD.

At UCSD, courses like CSE 258 (Recommender Systems), DSC 80 (Data Science in Practice), and CSE 150A (AI) shaped his approach to problem-solving. He developed a deep appreciation for how graph theory and machine learning can model real-world networks and decision systems.

Alongside his studies, he founded Gondilal Saraf — a jewelry business where he applies data science to inventory optimization, customer segmentation, and demand forecasting. Running a business while studying taught him how to bridge the gap between theory and practice.

## Education

### UC San Diego
- **Degree:** Bachelor of Science — BS, Data Science (Minor: Entrepreneurship & Innovation)
- **Period:** Sep 2022 — Jun 2027
- **GPA:** 3.96/4.0

- **Activities:** Wakesurfing, Swimming, Triton Thenix, Root]d Dance Club, Archery

- **Degree:** High School, Engineering Science
- **Period:** Apr 2020 — Jun 2022
- **Grade:** 96.75%
- **Board:** CBSE
- **Activities:** PhySoc (Physics Society), Mathematics Society, Exun Clan
- **Skills:** Mathematics, Python, Physics, Computer Science

## Professional Experience

### SWE Intern — UC San Diego (2024 – Present)
Software Engineering Intern working on undergraduate projects and research at UC San Diego.
Skills: Python, TypeScript, React

### Founder & Operator — Gondilal Saraf (2022 – Present)
Founded and operates a jewelry business, applying data-driven strategies to inventory optimization, customer segmentation, and demand forecasting in a traditional industry.
Skills: Entrepreneurship, Data Analysis, Business Strategy

## Projects (Detailed)

### Vaani — Multilingual AI Chatbot (Shelved)
Co-built with Ahaskar. A voice-first AI chatbot for Indian-language customer support — OpenAI LLM + speech APIs behind a Flask microservice backend, with a speech-to-text → intent → text-to-speech pipeline across 5+ Indian languages. Shelved mid-build after a market-fit check: in the Indian SME market the unit economics did not work, because a human customer-support agent costs less per conversation than bleeding-edge LLM inference. Kept visible as a deliberate learning.
- **Team:** Arnav Goel, Ahaskar
- **Tags:** OpenAI API, Flask, Real-time Speech Recognition, NLP, Python
- **Status:** Shelved / Co-authored
- **Date:** July 2024

### Handwritten Digits Classifier
Program that classifies handwritten digits using the MNIST Database. Built with TensorFlow at Delhi Public School, R. K. Puram.
- **Tags:** TensorFlow, Deep Learning, MNIST
- **Date:** January 2022

### Pet Classifier Model
Program that classifies common pet animals using their pictures. Trained on a private database provided by Delhi Public School and utilized the CNN framework for image recognition.
- **Tags:** CNN, Computer Vision, Deep Learning
- **Date:** January 2022

### PCOD Tracker — AI Health Companion
Built an AI-powered health management web application for women managing PCOD/PCOS (Polycystic Ovarian Disease/Syndrome).

**AI-Powered Rant & Vent:** Chat-like interface where users type free-form thoughts about their day. Claude Sonnet 4 analyzes the text and automatically extracts symptoms with severity (1-5), mood, energy levels, sleep hours, diet entries, exercise logs, medications taken/skipped, cycle information, and weight — all without any manual form filling.

**Medical Report Analysis:** Drag-and-drop PDF upload for lab reports. AI extracts and structures lab values (hormone markers like LH, FSH, Testosterone, AMH, metabolic markers, thyroid, vitamins), medications with dosage/frequency, diagnoses, and report dates. Automatically flags abnormal values.

**Health Tracking:** Symptom tracking with calendar heatmap and severity scale. Menstrual cycle logging with flow intensity and cycle length calculations. Mood & energy tracking with 8 mood options and energy slider. Diet logging with meal types and calorie tracking. Exercise logging with type, duration, and intensity.

**Medication Management:** Daily check-off system with streak tracking (last 7 days). Auto-detection of medications from uploaded reports. Active/inactive toggle and past medications archive.

**Lab Visualization:** Interactive grid of latest lab values color-coded by health status. Trend line charts via Recharts for each marker over time with normal ranges as reference lines.

**Tech Stack:** Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, TailwindCSS 4, PostgreSQL + Prisma 7 (15 models), NextAuth.js (Google OAuth + credentials with bcryptjs), Anthropic Claude API (Sonnet 4), pdf-parse (PDF text extraction), Recharts (lab trend charts), react-day-picker, Sonner (toasts), date-fns, next-themes.

**Database:** 15 Prisma models including User, Profile, CycleLog, SymptomLog, MoodLog, DietLog, ExerciseLog, LabReport, LabValue, Medication, MedicationLog, Rant.

**Security:** JWT sessions, bcryptjs password hashing, cascade deletes, privacy-first design. PDF text extracted locally, never stored externally.

- **Tags:** Next.js 16, Claude AI, PostgreSQL, Prisma, NextAuth.js, Recharts, TypeScript
- **Live:** https://pcod-tracker.vercel.app
- **Date:** March 2025
- **Status:** Featured Project

### Gondilal Saraf — Full-Stack Jewelry Platform
Built a full-stack e-commerce and ERP platform for a century-old family gold & silver jewelry business in Banda, U.P. (est. 1873).

**Public Storefront:** Heritage-themed bilingual (Hindi/English) site with live gold/silver rates, 10-year investment charts, cinematic vault gate animation, collections carousel, buying guide, scam protection section, customer reviews, contact form, and shop locator. Design system features parchment textures, antique gold accents, Cormorant Garamond typography, glassmorphism nav, parallax scrolling, and 3 switchable themes.

**Product Catalogue (/shop):** Searchable catalogue with sticky filters, shortlist system, customer accounts via OTP, virtual AR try-on (MediaPipe face landmarks), EMI calculator, WhatsApp ordering, deep linking, and share functionality.

**Admin ERP (/admin):** Dashboard for rate management, catalogue uploads with price auto-fill (weight + purity → auto-calculate), AI-powered product descriptions (Gemini 2.0 Flash), AI model images (Replicate SDXL inpainting), image processing pipeline (Photoroom background removal + Sharp polish), and storefront configuration.

**Tech Stack:** Next.js 15 (App Router), React 19, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Framer Motion, PostgreSQL + Prisma ORM (15 models), NextAuth.js (OTP via WhatsApp/Twilio + Google OAuth), 26 REST API routes, Razorpay (payments), Sharp + Photoroom (image pipeline), Gemini 2.0 Flash (AI descriptions), Replicate SDXL (AI model images), Zod validation, CryptoJS AES encryption, bwip-js barcodes, Decimal.js precision math, IndexNow SEO, Schema.org JSON-LD.

**Security:** Crypto-secure OTP with 10-min expiry, login lockout, rate limiting (5 login + 100 API per 15min per IP), AES encryption for customer PII, strict CSP, HSTS with preload, CSRF protection, full audit logging.

**Testing:** 85 tests via Vitest + GitHub Actions CI.

- **Tags:** Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Gemini AI, Replicate SDXL, Framer Motion, TailwindCSS, MediaPipe, NextAuth.js, WhatsApp API
- **Live:** https://gondilalsaraf.com
- **Date:** January 2025
- **Status:** Featured Project
